content: {"file": "backend/ingestion/chroma_client.py", "summary": "This file provides a singleton ChromaDB client and vector store management for three collections: sf_user_manuals, sf_codebase, and sf_jpa_entities. It includes methods to initialize the ChromaDB client, retrieve embeddings using Ollama, get specific or all vector stores, and reset individual collections.", "rules": [{"name": "Singleton Pattern", "description": "Ensure that only one instance of ChromaDB client and embeddings exists throughout the application lifecycle.", "conditions": ["ChromaDB client initialization", "Ollama embeddings initialization"], "actions": ["Return existing instance if already initialized"]}, {"name": "Collection Management", "description": "Manage vector stores for specific collections based on provided keys.", "conditions": ["Valid collection key provided", "Vector store not already cached"], "actions": ["Create and cache new Chroma vector store"]}], "dependencies": ["chromadb", "langchain_chroma", "langchain_ollama", "config"]}
